merge.description:
merge or patch the nats config
https://docs.nats.io/running-a-nats-service/configuration
following special rules apply
1. strings that start with << and end with >> will be unquoted
use this for variables and numbers with units
2. keys ending in $include will be switched to include directives
keys are sorted alphabetically, use prefix before $includes to control includes ordering
paths should be relative to /etc/nats-config/nats.conf
example:
merge:
$include: ./my-config.conf
zzz$include: ./my-config-last.conf
server_name: nats
authorization:
token: << $TOKEN >>
jetstream:
max_memory_store: << 1GB >>
will yield the config:
{
include ./my-config.conf;
"authorization": {
"token": $TOKEN
},
"jetstream": {
"max_memory_store": 1GB
},
"server_name": "nats",
include ./my-config-last.conf;
}

merge.description:
merge or patch the nats config
https://docs.nats.io/running-a-nats-service/configuration
following special rules apply
1. strings that start with << and end with >> will be unquoted
use this for variables and numbers with units
2. keys ending in $include will be switched to include directives
keys are sorted alphabetically, use prefix before $includes to control includes ordering
paths should be relative to /etc/nats-config/nats.conf
example:
merge:
$include: ./my-config.conf
zzz$include: ./my-config-last.conf
server_name: nats
authorization:
token: << $TOKEN >>
jetstream:
max_memory_store: << 1GB >>
will yield the config:
{
include ./my-config.conf;
"authorization": {
"token": $TOKEN
},
"jetstream": {
"max_memory_store": 1GB
},
"server_name": "nats",
include ./my-config-last.conf;
}

enabled.description:
config.nats.tls must be enabled also
when enabled, monitoring port will use HTTPS with the options from config.nats.tls
if promExporter is also enabled, consider setting promExporter.monitorDomain

env.description:
map with key as env var name, value can be string or map
example:
env:
GOMEMLIMIT: 7GiB
TOKEN:
valueFrom:
secretKeyRef:
name: nats-auth
key: token

digest.description: if digest is provided, it overrides tag (example: "sha256:abcdef1234567890")

fullImageName.description: if fullImageName is provided, it overrides registry, repository, tag, and digest

merge.description:
merge or patch the container
https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.24/#container-v1-core

ports.description:
container port options
must be enabled in the config section also
https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.24/#containerport-v1-core

resources.description:
container resources
requests:
cpu: 100m
memory: 128Mi
limits:
cpu: 100m
memory: 128Mi

extraResources.description:
Extra user-defined resources
add arbitrary user-generated resources
example:
config:
websocket:
enabled: true
extraResources:
- apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
name:
$tplYaml: >
{{ include "nats.fullname" $ | quote }}
labels:
$tplYaml: |
{{ include "nats.labels" $ }}
spec:
hosts:
- demo.nats.io
gateways:
- my-gateway
http:
- name: default
match:
- name: root
uri:
exact: /
route:
- destination:
host:
$tplYaml: >
{{ .Values.service.name | quote }}
port:
number:
$tplYaml: >
{{ .Values.config.websocket.port }}
